selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt requires boxes, paper/textbook/art supplies and spare classroom materials. Use only sealed low-profile archive/file boxes; exclude the unstable open storage-box asset rejected by strict forward simulation.
selections.style_notes: Distribute flat boxes and book stacks across separate shelves with clear front edges; dense but reachable and physically stable.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: flat sealed cardboard archive/file boxes and low textbook stacks. Optional: lidded low-profile tote, art paper packs

selections.prompt_constraints: Room must include "paper/textbook/art supplies" and general school storage realism.
selections.style_notes: Use uniform stacks (paper, binders) for a tidy look; avoid overhanging items.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: reams of copy paper, binders/folders. Optional: printer ink/toner box, clipboards

selections.prompt_constraints: Room must include "art supplies" and "spare classroom materials".
selections.style_notes: Moderate density; group by category (art vs. general supplies) and keep some negative space for access.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: art supply boxes (markers/crayons/paint), construction paper packs. Optional: glue bottles, scissors caddy

selections.prompt_constraints: Room-specific requirement: "at least four labeled bins" (this rack provides them; they should look in-use).
selections.style_notes: Clear labels visible; contents should be small, sorted, and not overflowing.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: 4 labeled pull-out bins containing small classroom supplies (erasers, dry-erase markers, glue sticks, scissors). Optional: tape rolls, sticky notes

selections.prompt_constraints: Room-specific requirement: "functional articulated school-supply utility cabinet with two hinged doors" plus cleaning supplies presence.
selections.style_notes: Keep hazardous-looking chemicals contained/organized; avoid clutter around door swing area and doorways.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: cleaning/maintenance consumables stored as labeled boxes (trash bags, paper towels). Optional: unopened cleaning spray bottles (if cabinet doors can be shown open), spare gloves

selections.prompt_constraints: Storage room realism implies an active sorting/packing surface with "paper" and supply handling.
selections.style_notes: Functional staging area; 5–8 small items max, leave clear working space at center.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: packing/sorting items (box cutter, packing tape, label roll/marker), small stack of papers/forms. Optional: clipboard, inventory sheet binder

selections.prompt_constraints: Room-specific requirement includes "maintenance tools"; tool chest is the most realistic anchor for them.
selections.style_notes: Minimal surface clutter; a few tools staged on top, the rest implied to be in drawers.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: maintenance tools on top (tape measure, screwdriver, adjustable wrench, work gloves). Optional: small parts tray (screws/anchors)
